title: SCC Hooks Configuration
description: JSON Schema for SCC hooks.json — defines Claude Code lifecycle hooks for Salesforce development

hooks.description: Map of lifecycle event names to arrays of hook group definitions

SessionStart.description: Hooks fired when a Claude Code session begins

PreToolUse.description: Hooks fired before a tool is used

PostToolUse.description: Hooks fired after a tool completes

PostToolUseFailure.description: Hooks fired when a tool use fails

Stop.description: Hooks fired when Claude Code agent stops

SessionEnd.description: Hooks fired when a session ends

hooks.description: Array of individual hook definitions in this group

description.description: Human-readable description of this hook group

profile.description: Minimum profile level required for this hook group to run

type.description: Hook execution type — currently only 'command' is supported

command.description: Shell command to execute. Use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} for the plugin root path.

async.description: Whether to run this hook asynchronously (non-blocking)

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds before the hook is killed

env.description: Additional environment variables to set for this hook
